case_title: ALONSO MARTINEZ VERDE VS. HIPOLITO ESPINOZA

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VERDE, ALONSO MARTINEZ RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESPINOZA, HIPOLITO ANINDIVIDUAL DBA ALPHA CONSTRUCTION CO. $4,829.92 PRINCIPAL, $139.07 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,193.99, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
